meaning: n.痛饮,大喝(尤指从瓶口喝的)v.满满一口喝下,牛饮,大喝特喝
examples: Brian took a swig of his beer.
She took a swig of wine.
Compare and contrast with XS and swig.
At PepsiCo all this change isn't going down as easily as a swig of Gatorade.
Outside a hair salon, men in frocks swig cider in celebration of Gay Pride.
